coverage.payer_name: Blue Cross Blue Shield of Massachusetts

narrative: Maya's flagship ER statement: a $8,432 bill with a duplicated chest X-ray, an upcoded level-5 visit, an unbundled metabolic panel, and an EOB that only adjudicated one of the X-rays.
title: Maya Chen — ER overbill (duplicate + upcode + unbundle + EOB mismatch)
